dispatch_history.notes: G3b runbook landed earlier same day; operator browser-download cycle not yet completed.

dispatch_history.precondition_mismatch: Re-fire prompt §0/§Preconditions assert A1+A2 complete; on-disk Test-Path returns False; PDFs absent; gate fails identically to dispatch 1.
dispatch_history.notes: Dispatch 2 fired before operator's browser-download cycle completed.

dispatch_history.phase_c0_result: PASS (with judgment-call: spec said workspace-root path; runbook-canonical path accepted)
dispatch_history.phase_c1_result: HALT (Wasow PDF has no text layer; OCR engine unavailable)
dispatch_history.phase_c2_result_part_i: PASS (Birkhoff 1930 §2 formal-series existence theorem; uniform in d / n / p)
dispatch_history.phase_c2_result_part_ii: NIA (Borel-singularity radius theorem is NOT in Birkhoff 1930 §§2-3; spec inaccuracy noted in unexpected_finds.json)
dispatch_history.notes: First dispatch with PDFs actually on disk. Phase C.0 hash check passes for all 4 file slots (2 runbook-named + 2 Q20A-spec-named aliases). Phase C.1 blocked by Wasow's image-only PDF. Phase C.2 partially executes: Birkhoff §2 existence theorem extracted (uniform in d, no cap). Spec error noted: Borel-singularity claim (theorem ii of C.2) is not in §§2-3 of Birkhoff 1930; lives in B-T 1933 / Wasow X.3.

antecedent.operator_action_completed_dispatch_3: PDFs landed under runbook-canonical path; SHA256SUMS.txt generated.
antecedent.operator_action_remaining_for_dispatch_4: Wasow §X.3 in machine-readable form (OCR'd PDF, transcribed text file, or alternative source) under the literature directory; SHA256SUMS.txt updated.

resumption_procedure: Operator provides Wasow §X.3 in machine-readable form (text file or OCR'd PDF). Re-fire Q20A-PHASE-C-RESUME (dispatch 4). Phase A* and Phase C.0 cache forward; Phase C.1 picks up from this halt; Phase C.2 (ii) requires either Wasow §X.3 (Borel content) or B-T 1933 acquisition.
